channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — April 30, 2026
item.description: For having taken one, you will not recognize the rest for what they are.And they WILL follow. Attack in any form has placed your foot upon the twisted stairway that leads from Heaven.Yet any instant it is possible to have all this undone. How can you know whether you chose the stairs to Heaven or the way to hell? Quite easily. How do you feel? Is peace in your awareness? Are you certain which way

item.title: Lesson 21: “I am determined to see things differently.”
item.description: “I am determined to see things differently.” The idea for today is obviously a continuation and extension of the preceding one. This time, however, specific mind searching periods are necessary in addition to applying the idea to particular situations as they arise. Five practice periods are urged, allowing a full minute for each. In the practice periods, begin by repeating the idea to yourse
